name: Mya
background: University student dealing with stress and anxiety, looking for affordable mental health support.
goals: Access helpful mental health resources without paying high subscription fees
pain_points: Important features are locked behind a paywall.
Feels frustrated when she cannot try features before paying
context: Uses mobile apps daily and prefers free or low-cost tools due to limited budget.

name: Mick
background: Working professional who wants to maintain good mental health and manage stress.
goals: Track mood and mental health regularly
Gain useful insights and improve emotional well-being.
pain_points: Needs consistent motivation to keep using the app
context: Uses the app during daily routines and values structured guidance.

name: Aysha
background: Casual app user who expects smooth performance and ease of use.
goals: Use the app without technical issues
Have access to basic features like language settings.
context: Uses multiple apps daily and quickly abandons apps that are unreliable.

name: Gabriel
background: Privacy-conscious user concerned about personal data and security.
goals: Feel safe sharing personal mental health data
Trust the app with sensitive information.
pain_points: Uncertainty about how data is stored or used
Lack of transparency about privacy policies
context: Avoids apps that seem untrustworthy or unclear about data handling.

name: Priya
background: User experiencing mental health challenges such as anxiety and intrusive thoughts.
goals: Find emotional support and coping tools
Better understand and manage her mental state.
pain_points: Needs more personalized and deeper support.
context: Uses the app during difficult emotional moments and seeks comfort and guidance.
